Clinical notes:

- CU-002: Responding well; weight gain improving
- CU-003: New enrollment; first dose given 2026-03-27

On PK stability: nothing in the current dosing config suggests an obvious issue, and the patient notes look broadly reassuring. That said, this is just the dosing parameter file, not a fresh PK model output or monitoring readout, so I can’t fully confirm model stability from this alone.

If you want, I can also format this into a short email-ready note for Dr. Martinez.
